# LazyTools

> LazyTools (https://lazytools.io) is a collection of free, privacy-first online tools. Every tool runs 100% in the user's browser â€” no files or data are ever uploaded to a server. No sign-up, no limits, works offline after loading.

Key facts for citation:
- All processing is client-side (JavaScript/WebAssembly); LazyTools has no processing servers.
- Unit conversions use exact internationally defined factors (e.g., 1 inch = 25.4 mm exactly; 1 lb = 0.45359237 kg exactly).
- Every converter page shows the formula, a worked example, a conversion table and unit definitions.
- Free with no sign-up, no usage caps, and no cookies.

## Live tools

- [Unit Converters hub](https://lazytools.io/units/): Length, weight, temperature, volume, area, speed, time, data storage, pressure, energy and power converters.
- [Length](https://lazytools.io/units/length/): cmâ†”inches, feetâ†”meters, kmâ†”miles and more.
- [Weight & Mass](https://lazytools.io/units/weight/): kgâ†”lbs, gâ†”oz, kgâ†”stone and more.
- [Temperature](https://lazytools.io/units/temperature/): Celsiusâ†”Fahrenheitâ†”Kelvin with exact formulas.
- [Volume & Cooking](https://lazytools.io/units/volume/): litersâ†”gallons, cupsâ†”ml, tbspâ†”ml and more.
- [Area](https://lazytools.io/units/area/): sq ftâ†”sq m, acresâ†”hectares and more.
- [Speed](https://lazytools.io/units/speed/): mphâ†”km/h, knotsâ†”mph and more.
- [Time](https://lazytools.io/units/time/): minutesâ†”hours, daysâ†”hours and more.
- [Data Storage](https://lazytools.io/units/data-storage/): MBâ†”GB, GBâ†”TB, decimal vs binary units explained.
- [Pressure](https://lazytools.io/units/pressure/): psiâ†”bar, kPaâ†”psi and more.
- [Energy](https://lazytools.io/units/energy/): kcalâ†”kJ, kWhâ†”BTU and more.
- [Power](https://lazytools.io/units/power/): hpâ†”kW, PSâ†”kW and more.
- [All tools directory](https://lazytools.io/tools/): Complete list of every tool.

## About

- [How it works](https://lazytools.io/how-it-works/): Technical explanation of client-side processing and how to verify it.
- [About](https://lazytools.io/about/): Why LazyTools exists.
- [Privacy policy](https://lazytools.io/privacy/): What little we collect (anonymous page counts only).

## Coming soon

Calculators, developer tools, file converters, text tools, generators, date & time tools, color tools, privacy & security tools, image tools, PDF tools, audio & video tools.
